requirement_closure: Ticket ask: fix checkout payment refund rounding
critical_invariants: Refund amounts must never round in the customer's favor beyond one cent.

self_review_cycles.diff: switched refund math to integer cents
risks: floating-point refund rounding drifts under split payment
self_review_cycles.findings: the checkout refund rounding used floating-point cents and lost a cent under split payments; switched to integer-cent math before submit
self_review_cycles.raw: lens=Security and failure modes; risks=floating-point refund rounding drifts under split payment; findings=checkout refund rounding lost a cent; verdict=fail
